Clan Alfieri.description: The Clan Alfieri was a Camorra organization operating in the northeastern suburbs of Naples, Italy, specifically in the areas of Saviano and Nola, with a stronghold in Piazzolla di Nola. Founded in 1953 by brothers Salvatore and Carmine Alfieri, it became part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation in the late 1970s to oppose Raffaele Cutolo's NCO. The clan was involved in the Camorra wars and was eventually dismantled.

'Ndrina Trovato.description: The 'Ndrina Trovato is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Marcedusa, Calabria, Italy. Active in northern Italy since the early 1980s, particularly in Milan, Lecco, Como, and Varese, it engages in drug trafficking, money laundering through construction and nightclubs. The group has alliances with other 'ndrine such as Barbaro, Papalia, and Pelle-Vottari. It has been targeted in multiple operations including Wall Street (1993), Oversize (2001-2006), Annibale (2010), Metastasi (2014), and Cardine-Metal Money (2021).

Honoured Society.description: The Honoured Society is a Calabrian 'ndrangheta criminal confederation active in Australia, founded around 1920 in Melbourne. It controls Italian-Australian organized crime along the East Coast, involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and money laundering. The organization has been marked by internal power struggles and conflicts such as the Market Wars. It remains active with close cooperation with the Carlton Crew.

descriptions: The Honoured Society is a subgroup of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Honoured Society is a Calabrian 'Ndrangheta group based in Melbourne.

'Ndrina Tripodi.description: The Tripodi are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Vibo Valentia, Italy, allied with the Mancuso clan. They have branches in Lombardy, Lazio, and Veneto. The clan has been involved in vote-buying for political figures in exchange for contracts, as revealed by the 2013 operation Atlantide/Lybra. In 2014, investigations focused on boss Nicola Tripodi's alleged no-show job at a company linked to RTL 102.5.

descriptions: Accorinti has been in contact with Tripodi since the 1990s for heroin trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo il pentito Servello gli Accorinti sarebbero in rapporto con i Tripodi di Vibo Valentia sin dagli anni '90 per spaccio di eroina

descriptions: The Tripodi 'ndrina is allied with the Mancuso 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: I Tripodi sono una 'ndrina di Vibo Valentia alleata dei Mancuso

De Luca Bossa clan.description: Camorra clan operating in the eastern suburbs of Naples, specifically Ponticelli and Cercola. Founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as 'o sicco, after splitting from the Sarno clan. Engaged in a bloody feud with the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno families, culminating in a car bomb attack in 1998. The clan was dismantled after the killing of its acting boss Giuseppe Mignano in 2002.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supported the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan, in fact, is the first to offer support to the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarnos, in the times of the violent feud between the two organizations.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan formed a criminal alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: This new wave of extortions made by the clan are considered part of the new criminal alliance between the Aprea clan, the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the De Luca Bossa clan to undermine the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the latest DIA reports, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan from San Giovanni a Teduccio , and with the De Luca Bossa clan from Ponticelli , with the intention of undermining the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan formed a new criminal alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan is a Camorra clan, part of the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: After a time inactive, the De Luca Bossa clan is believed to be gaining power again in the eastern area of Naples, specifically in Ponticelli , thanks to the merger with emergent groups as the Minichini and Schisa. The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as ‘O sicco , in the 1990s

descriptions: Sarno and De Luca Bossa fought a faida, culminating in the 1998 Ponticelli car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Sarno e i De Luca Bossa : questa faida può essere considerata come una sorta di "spin-off" della faida tra i Misso e l' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: contro il clan De Luca Bossa

descriptions: Infobox lists Aprea-Cuccaro clan as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marfella clan, Rinaldi clan, Secondigliano Alliance, Aprea-Cuccaro clan

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was protected by ties with Aprea-Cuccaro.
edges.evidence_quote: i De Luca Bossa, insieme ai loro alleati, avrebbero trasferito la loro roccaforte nella vicina Barra ‘protetti’ dai legami con gli Aprea-Cuccaro

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Aprea and Rinaldi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleandosi con gli Aprea di Barra e ai Rinaldi di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Minichini killed a member of the Barbudos clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cepparulo, ritenuto esponente del cosiddetto clan dei Barbudos

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans fought against the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella fought the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: le forze dei due clan si uniscono nel combattere il clan Lago

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: thanks to the relationship between Teresa De Luca Bossa, mother of Antonio, with Giuseppe Marfella, boss of the Marfella clan, based in Pianura, the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie alla frequentazione di Teresa De Luca Bossa con Giuseppe Marfella, boss di Pianura, le forze dei due clan si uniscono nel combattere il clan Lago

descriptions: Infobox lists Mariano clan as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Minichini are considered a single criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 28 marzo 2019 I Carabinieri ... hanno dato esecuzione a un decreto di fermo ... per aver commesso il fatto avvalendosi della forza d’intimidazione del clan camorristico dei “Minichini-De Luca Bossa”

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was in a bloody feud with the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno families.
edges.evidence_quote: La lunga e sanguinosa faida che ha visto contrapposte negli anni le famiglie De Luca Bossa e Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a bloody war against the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as ‘O sicco , in the 1990s, and was famous for the bloody war against the once powerful Sarno clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a war with Sarno clan for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 90s, Antonio became a trusted member of the Sarno clan, however, he decided to create his own clan, which ended in a bloody war between the then newly created clan and the Sarnos for the control of the territory.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Schisa, a splinter of ex-Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo formato dai Minichini e dai De Luca Bossa è tornato in auge, unitamente agli Schisa, costola dell’ex clan Sarno

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was rival to D'Amico and De Micco clans.
edges.evidence_quote: disputato da clan rivali, come i clan D'Amico (detti fraulella) e i clan De Micco (detti i bodo)

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan was at war with De Micco clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the war between the De Luca Bossa and the De Micco clans.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was rival to D'Amico and De Micco clans.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan

descriptions: De Luca Bossa alliance aimed to oust the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: con l’intento di imporsi nell’area est di Napoli scalzando i Mazzarella

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan formed a new criminal alliance with the Aprea-Cuccaro clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan formed an alliance with Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Minichini was known to have a good relationship with Ciro Rinaldi, boss of the Rinaldi clan, also based in the eastern part of Naples, making an alliance between the two clans.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Aprea and Rinaldi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleandosi con gli Aprea di Barra e ai Rinaldi di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan allied with Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In the years when Teresa De Luca Bossa was in command, the clan also made an alliance with the powerful Secondigliano Alliance.

descriptions: Teresa De Luca Bossa was a member of the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: membro di quel cartello conosciuto come Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Mazzarella clan is rival of De Luca Bossa clan according to infobox.

descriptions: Rinaldi clan formed an alliance with De Luca Bossa clan since 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2019 the clan has formed an alliance with the Ponticelli 's De Luca Bossa clan , and Barra 's Aprea-Cuccaro clan , called by the media Rinaldi-De Luca Bossa-Aprea

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan is a founding clan and ally of the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Founding clans : Contini clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , Di Lauro clan , Rinaldi clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: 12st Players listed as rival in infobox.

descriptions: Sicilian Mafia has connections with Corsican gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: The Italian crime groups (especially the Sicilian Mafia) have also connections with Corsican gangs.

Blood Magic Gang.description: A Russian gang of serial killers organized in 2007 by 19-year-old Konstantin Shumkov in Irkutsk. The gang consisted of teenagers from dysfunctional families who murdered five elderly people, participated in one rape, and injured three others from January to June 2008. Members were sentenced to imprisonment in 2010.

descriptions: Dung Hà was romantically involved with Hùng 'the warbler', a gang boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Dung Hà was acquainted with and loved Hùng 'the warbler', who was a reputable gang boss in the areas around the bus station

descriptions: Dung Hà and Hùng Cốm cooperated in running casinos and committing crimes.
edges.evidence_quote: Along with her lover Hùng Cốm, Dung Hà started opening up casinos in the area, as the two went on a mass crime spree in the area.

descriptions: Năm Cam's mob and Dung Hà's group were in conflict, leading to Năm Cam ordering her murder.
edges.evidence_quote: After a series of confrontations and standoffs between Dung Hà's group and Năm Cam's mob, Cam ordered the murder of Dung Hà.

descriptions: Năm Cam ordered the assassination of Dung Hà after a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: On October 2, 2000, Dung Hà was assassinated under orders from Năm Cam, who had previously been in a feud with Dung Hà in Saigon.

descriptions: SETCO transported supplies for Los Contras.
edges.evidence_quote: la compañía aérea hondureña SETCO, fue la principal empresa utilizada por La Contra en Honduras para transportar suministros y personal para la FDN

'Ndrina Belcastro.description: The Belcastro are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Ilario dello Ionio, Calabria, Italy. They have been involved in a long-running feud with the D'Agostino clan, known as the Faida di Sant'Ilario, which led to multiple murders and law enforcement operations. Key members include Giuseppe Belcastro, a capobastone sentenced to life imprisonment. The group remains active in drug trafficking and extortion.

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo and D'Agostino were opposing sides in the Faida di Sant'Ilario.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sant'Ilario : A Sant'Ilario dello Ionio il 15 agosto 1990 viene ucciso Emanuele Quattrone (mandato dai De Stefano per proteggerlo dalla faida con gli Imerti ) e secondo l'operazione Primaluce si apre una nuova faida con i Belcastro-Romeo che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo are in conflict with D'Agostino.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Belcastro and Romeo are allied in the faida against D'Agostino.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo wanted to break away from D'Agostino, leading to a faida.
edges.evidence_quote: si apre una nuova faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) si vogliono distaccare dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Mariano and Di Blasi fought a bloody faida in the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida dei Quartieri Spagnoli : combattuta tra i clan Mariano, detti i picuozzi , e Di Blasi, detti i faiano , alla fine degli anni ottanta

descriptions: Clan Mariano was at war with Faiano (Di Biasi) in the early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Mariano fu in guerra prima con i Faiano (i Di Biasi) e poi con l' Alleanza di Secondigliano agli inizi degli anni novanta per il controllo dei Quartieri Spagnoli.

Bonde do Maluco.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Bahia, founded in 2015 in the Mata Escura penitentiary complex in Salvador. Specializes in drug trafficking, robberies, kidnappings, and murders. It is the largest criminal organization in Bahia, with an estimated 15,000 members, and has expanded to other states. Allied with the PCC and rivals with the Comando Vermelho and Katiara.

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco originated as an offshoot of the defunct Caveira faction.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was born as an offshoot of a defunct criminal faction known as Caveira

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco originated as a branch of the extinct Caveira faction.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo nasceu como uma ramificação de uma extinta facção criminosa conhecida como Caveira

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Comando Vermelho a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV) and Katiara within the Bahian capital

descriptions: Dalen Network is affiliated with Farsta yngre.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dalen Network, which appears to be affiliated with Farsta yngre among other things

descriptions: Foxtrot commits violent crimes against Dalen Network.
edges.evidence_quote: People hired by the Foxtrot network and Majid have committed several violent crimes against the Dalen Network and their allies.

descriptions: Babylon Brigades clashed with Nineveh Plains Protection Units over a base.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2023 there was a brief clash between the Babylon Brigades and the Assyrians of Qaraqosh after the former attempted to take control of a base belonging to the Nineveh Plains Protection Units.

Aryan Guard.description: Neo-Nazi terrorist organization based in Alberta, Canada, primarily in Calgary. Founded in late 2006 by Kyle McKee. Engaged in flyering campaigns targeting immigrants and staged demonstrations. Reported to have disbanded in 2009 due to internal conflicts, though the group denied disbanding.

descriptions: Aryan Guard members placed bombs at the home of a WEB member, indicating conflict between the groups.
edges.evidence_quote: On the morning of November 21, 2009, two homemade bombs were left on the doorstep of WEB (Western European Bloodline) member Tyler Sturrup.

Nine Trey Gangsters.description: The Nine Trey Gangsters are a set of the United Blood Nation street gang, operating primarily on the East Coast of the United States. Founded in 1993 at Rikers Island, New York by Omar Portee and Leonard McKenzie, the gang is involved in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, robbery, extortion, and counterfeiting. They have been investigated by the FBI, DEA, and ATF, and have faced multiple prosecutions including Operation Nine Connect in 2006.

descriptions: Infobox lists Nine Trey Gangsters as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nine Trey Gangsters

descriptions: The Lucchese family lists the Nine Trey Gangsters as an ally in its infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nine Trey Gangsters

descriptions: The Lucchese family is allied with the Nine Trey Gangsters.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Buffalo crime family , Chicago Outfit , Colombo crime family , DeCavalcante crime family , Gambino crime family , Genovese crime family , Philadelphia crime family , Pittsburgh crime family , Nine Trey Gangsters , Purple Gang , South Brooklyn Boys , Tanglewood Boys , Velentzas Organization

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nine Trey Gangsters

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction allied with Nine Trey Gangsters to smuggle drugs and phones into prison.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Lucchese family's New Jersey faction had an alliance with a New Jersey corrections officer and members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods) to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters are a set of the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods)

descriptions: The infobox lists Crips as a rival of Nine Trey Gangsters.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lucchese crime family , United Blood Nation

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters allied with Lucchese crime family for smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Heat... uncovered a conspiracy in which the UBN's Nine Trey Gangsters faction entered into an alliance with the Lucchese crime family to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a subset of United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nine Trey Gangster Bloods or Nine Trey Gangsta Bloods ( NTG ) (also known simply as Nine Trey Gangsters or referred to as Bentley's or Billionaires ) are a " set " of the United Blood Nation street gang

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a faction of the United Blood Nation.

descriptions: The Puerto Rican Mob lists La Rompe ONU as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Rompe ONU

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is listed as a rival of the Puerto Rican Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Rompe ONU

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is a rival organization formed by former ONU members, engaged in a violent war against ONU.
edges.evidence_quote: La Rompe ONU ("ONU Breakers") is a rival organization which is also devoted to the drug trade in Puerto Rico. Rompe ONU was first organized by several former ONU members and has been involved in a violent war against ONU members.

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is listed as a rival of Ñetas in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 20 Luv, Latin Kings, Trinitarios, Dominicans Don't Play, Los Solidos, United Blood Nation, Grupo 27, La Rompe ONU

descriptions: Loughborough Bois merged with GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Another gang, Loughborough Bois based in Loughborough Junction , decided to merge with GAS Gang.

descriptions: ELN attacked and assassinated members of Esperanza, Paz y Libertad.
edges.evidence_quote: The FARC, the remaining EPL dissidents and the ELN considered Esperanza, Paz y Libertad and all the demobilized EPL to be 'traitors' and paramilitary collaborators, initiating a series of attacks and assassination attempts on the former EPL members.

descriptions: The EPL's demobilized members formed the political party Esperanza, Paz y Libertad.
edges.evidence_quote: Most of its former members demobilized in 1991, forming the Esperanza, Paz y Libertad ( Hope, Peace, and Liberty ) party

descriptions: FARC attacked and assassinated members of Esperanza, Paz y Libertad.
edges.evidence_quote: The FARC, the remaining EPL dissidents and the ELN considered Esperanza, Paz y Libertad and all the demobilized EPL to be 'traitors' and paramilitary collaborators, initiating a series of attacks and assassination attempts on the former EPL members.

descriptions: February 14 Youth Coalition is listed as an ally of PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... February 14 Youth Coalition

descriptions: February 14 Youth Coalition is listed as a non-state ally of PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: State allies Iran, Iraq, Russia, Syria (until 2024), Non-state allies Islamic Resistance in Iraq, Hezbollah, Peshmerga (only against ISIS), Islamic Dawa Party (Nouri al-Maliki), Syrian Democratic Forces (only against ISIS), February 14 Youth Coalition, Houthis, Hezbollah Al-Hejaz, Sinjar Resistance Units

descriptions: February 14 Youth Coalition is listed as an ally of PMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... February 14 Youth Coalition

descriptions: The Chaplains were bitter enemies of South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Also bitter enemies of SBB were the Puerto Rican Gangs, The Untouchable Bishops, and the Apaches, and the African American gangs The Mau Maus, and the Chaplains.

Cartel de La Guajira.description: Criminal organization originating from Maicao, operating in the La Guajira peninsula across the Colombia-Venezuela border. Specializes in smuggling, drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. Has ties to the Cártel de los Soles and former Venezuelan military officials.

descriptions: A leader of the Costa cartel was a partner of the Guajira cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Salomón Camacho Mora alias "Papa Grande": Segundo al mando del Cartel de la Costa y socio del Cartel de La Guajira.

descriptions: Marriage between Clíver Alcalá (member of Cártel de los Soles) and Marta González (niece of Cartel de La Guajira capo) signified an alliance between the two cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Según el medio colombiano Caracol Radio, el matrimonio entre Alcalá y González habría significado una alianza entre los carteles de La Guajira y el de Los Soles.

descriptions: Cartel de La Guajira conducted direct drug trafficking business with the Cártel de los Soles.
edges.evidence_quote: El cartel guajiro también realizó negocios directos relacionados al narcotráfico con el vicepresidente venezolano Tareck El Aissami, el Cartel de los Soles y Walid Makled.

descriptions: Los Pingüinos is a band of hitmen and thieves associated with the Cartel de La Guajira.
edges.evidence_quote: Una de las bandas de sicarios y atracadores asociadas al cartel de La Guajira es conocida como "Los Pingüinos"

descriptions: Cartel de La Guajira supplied weapons to the Bloque Norte de las AUC.
edges.evidence_quote: El cartel también trafica con armas en el mercado negro, siendo proveedor del extinto del grupo narcoparamilitar Bloque Norte de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC).

descriptions: Sword Boys is linked to car rebirthing operations by Western Sydney gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Sword Boys ... has also been linked to car rebirthing by Western Sydney gangs, where stolen cars are stripped and reassembled.

descriptions: A former Ang Soon Tong member joined Loh Kuan, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Leong Fook Weng, a former Ang Soon Tong member, left the gang and joined another gang, Loh Kuan.

Foxtrot.description: Foxtrot is a Swedish criminal network that emerged at the end of the 2010s, led by Rawa Majid (the Kurdish Fox). It is Sweden's main distributor of narcotics and has been linked to shootings, bombings, and assaults. The network has developed direct operational ties with Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security, and has been involved in attempted attacks on Israeli and Jewish targets in Europe.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Bro-network.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: Foxtrot commits violent crimes against Dalen Network.
edges.evidence_quote: People hired by the Foxtrot network and Majid have committed several violent crimes against the Dalen Network and their allies.

descriptions: Foxtrot has direct operational ties with Iran's government.
edges.evidence_quote: Foxtrot has developed direct operational ties with the Iranian government, specifically Iran’s Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS).

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Zero Network.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

Daybreak Boys.description: The Daybreak Boys was a New York City street gang formed in the late 1840s. Active along the waterfront, they were known for unprovoked murders, robberies, and sabotaging ships. By 1852, they were suspected of 20 to 40 murders and thefts worth $200,000. The gang was broken up by police in 1859 after several gunfights killed over 12 members.

descriptions: The Atlantic Guards were allied with the American Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bowery Boys , American Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans

descriptions: Infobox lists American Guards as allies of Bowery Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Guards, Atlantic Guards, Empire Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans, American Republican Party (American Nativist Party, American Party), Order of the Star Spangled Banner (Anti-immigrant secret society)

descriptions: American Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department
